lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
The vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and visible damage to both the exterior body and the interior upholstery. Major systems require extensive repair or replacement.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant restoration or can be used for parts. The exterior shows heavy wear with visible rust on the body panels, faded paint, and several dents. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn and some interior components are missing or broken. Mechanically, the engine runs but has a persistent oil leak, and the transmission requires attention. It is being sold strictly as-is to someone prepared for a project.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained over the years. Mechanically, it is very dependable; the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts as it should without any hesitation. The exterior still maintains a nice luster, though you will find some minor stone chips on the hood and a small scratch on the rear bumper consistent with its age. Inside, the cabin is clean and free of odors, with only slight wear on the driver's seat bolster. It has a complete service history and is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

Looking for a reliable vehicle that’s ready for its next chapter? This car is in fair condition and has been a dependable companion. While it shows some expected cosmetic wear and could use a few minor updates, it remains a solid and functional choice for anyone seeking a practical daily driver at an accessible price point!

This vehicle is in mint condition. The interior and exterior show no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order and have been maintained to original factory standards.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in showroom-standard condition, it features an impeccable exterior finish and a flawlessly maintained interior. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. An uncompromising choice for the discerning driver who demands excellence without exception.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total beauty! This car is in pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the lot. It’s been babied since day one, always garaged, and drives like an absolute dream. You’ll be hard-pressed to find another one this clean. I'm sad to see it go, but I know it'll make the next owner so happy! Feel free to reach out if you want to come take a look!
Offered is an investment-grade 997.1 Carrera S, preserved in concours-level condition. This example features the M97.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Flawless interior. Service records available.

This is a rare opportunity to own a truly showroom-quality vehicle that has been meticulously preserved since day one. Bathed in a deep, lustrous finish that has been protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating, the exterior is absolutely flawless—free of stone chips, door dings, or even the slightest swirl marks. Every body panel aligns perfectly, reflecting a life spent in a climate-controlled garage. Step inside, and you’re greeted by an

Presenting a vehicle of superlative caliber, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish paired with a pristine interior that retains its original showroom luster. Mechanically flawless and rigorously inspected, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands peerless quality.

We are pleased to present this peerless example of automotive engineering, maintained in impeccable condition. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, offering a flawless aesthetic and mechanical profile that satisfies the most discerning collector. Experience uncompromised luxury and performance in a vehicle that presents as new.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty. It's in absolutely stunning condition—honestly, it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken incredible care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for a car that's basically brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin, you won't be disappointed!

Presenting a collector-grade FD3S RX-7, featuring the iconic 1.3L 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged rotary powerplant. This specimen maintains factory-spec compression across all rotors, benefiting from a proactive overhaul of the complex vacuum solenoid system with high-temp Viton lines. The chassis remains structurally flawless, retaining its original 50/50 weight distribution and aluminum double-wishbone suspension geometry. Power is delivered through a precise short-throw 5-speed manual gearbox to a Torsen limited-slip differential. Every
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records included.

Offered here is a truly exceptional specimen that redefines the standard for a pre-owned vehicle. This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its showroom-quality finish. The exterior paint is deep and lustrous, entirely free of swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections, and has been recently treated with a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of creasing or bolster wear, and the original factory protective films are still present on several interior trim pieces. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach. It has followed a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified technicians, with a comprehensive folder of service records included. Every button, switch, and electronic feature functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to own a vehicle that is, for all intents and purposes, indistinguishable from new. The sale includes both original keys, the original window sticker, and all factory owner's manuals.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the most exacting standards. This specimen retains its original showroom luster, exhibiting flawless mechanical integrity and an interior of unrivaled preservation. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than aesthetic and functional perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly pristine condition.

Presenting a vehicle of unparalleled distinction. This meticulously maintained specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in showroom condition with uncompromising attention to detail. Every surface, mechanical component, and aesthetic element adheres to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a vehicle that transcends the standard pre-owned market and offers a peerless driving experience.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that’s basically brand new? I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s in flawless condition! I’ve babied this car from day one, so it’s super clean inside and out. It drives like a dream and still has that fresh-off-the-lot feel. You really have to see it to believe how pristine it is! Come take a look and fall in love!

This pristine 2004 BMW M3 (E46) represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance. Under the hood, the S54 3.2L straight-six remains factory-spec, benefiting from recent preventative rod bearing service and a Beisan Systems VANOS overhaul to ensure optimal valve timing. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, channeling power through a reinforced subframe to the M-Variable limited-slip differential. The suspension geometry is sharpened by Bilstein PSS10 adjustable coilovers, while the braking system retains its original bite with fresh rotors and high-friction pads. Meticulously maintained with zero mechanical deficiencies, this example offers a rigid chassis and exceptional throttle response through its individual throttle bodies. A truly turn-key collector-grade machine.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No mechanical issues. Inspection welcome.

Experience automotive perfection with this impeccably maintained vehicle, presented in absolute showroom condition. The exterior boasts a mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, while the cabin remains in a 'time-capsule' state, featuring pristine leather and that distinctive luxury feel. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships, with full documentation and receipts provided. Mechanically, it operates with the precision of a Swiss watch—smooth, powerful, and utterly reliable. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a truly flawless example that has been pampered in a climate-controlled garage since day one. Includes all original manuals, keys, and premium floor mats.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been curated and maintained to the most exacting standards. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a rigorous commitment to preservation. Mechanically superior and aesthetically indistinguishable from a new arrival, this offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands absolute perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless aesthetic profile and a mechanical pedigree that reflects meticulous stewardship. Every surface, component, and detail has been preserved with the utmost precision, offering the discerning driver an opportunity to acquire a truly pristine asset. This is, without reservation, an investment-grade acquisition for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! 👋 You honestly won’t believe how gorgeous this ride is—it’s basically in showroom condition! I’ve babied this car from day one, and it looks and drives just like it did the day I drove it off the lot. If you’re looking for a total gem that’s been loved and cared for, this is the one for you. Come see it for yourself, you're going to love it! ✨

2022 model. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No cosmetic or mechanical flaws. Pristine interior.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in showroom-ready condition. The exterior paint retains its original deep luster with zero swirl marks or rock chips, having been professionally ceramic coated and strictly garage-kept under a breathable cover. Inside, the cabin remains in an impeccable state; the premium leather seats show no signs of bolster wear, the carpets are protected by original factory mats, and every electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, it is flawless. It has been maintained with an open-checkbook policy, documented by a comprehensive service history from certified technicians. The engine bay is pristine, the undercarriage is remarkably clean, and the high-performance tires have nearly full

We are privileged to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that defines automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom-caliber condition, reflecting meticulous preservation and a rigorous adherence to mechanical integrity. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands a benchmark-quality example, this motorcar offers an unparalleled presentation and a driving experience that remains indistinguishable from its original delivery.
